examples: Perhaps he should forewarn customers with a little sign.
We are missing a golden opportunity to forewarn new parents of the challenges they might face once their baby arrives.
But I will forewarn you whom ye shall fear: fear him, which after he hath killed hath power to cast into hell; yea, I say unto you, fear him.
One problem, say Chen's critics, was that he didn't forewarn his top advisers of his announcement.
So forewarn your fellow cube-dwellers, you're in it to win it this tournament season--the money and the bragging rights, that is.
